ddls:
CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for user authentication */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., user, admin) */,
  "registration_date" TEXT /* Date the user registered */,
  "last_login_date" TEXT /* Date of the user's last login */,
  "account_status" TEXT /* Status of the user's account (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "movies" (
  "movie_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each movie */,
  "title" TEXT /* Title of the movie */,
  "release_year" INTEGER /* Year the movie was released */,
  "genre" TEXT /* Genre of the movie */,
  "director" TEXT /* Director of the movie */,
  "rating" REAL /* Average rating of the movie */,
  "runtime" INTEGER /* Runtime of the movie in minutes */,
  "languages" TEXT /* Languages spoken in the movie */,
  "awards" TEXT /* Awards won by the movie */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("movie_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "ratings" (
  "rating_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each rating */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who rated the movie */,
  "movie_id" INTEGER /* ID of the movie being rated */,
  "rating" INTEGER /* Boolean value indicating whether the user liked (1) or disliked (0) the movie */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp when the rating was submitted */,
  "rating_type" TEXT /* Type of rating (e.g., explicit, implicit) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("rating_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_ratings_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_ratings_movie_id FOREIGN KEY ("movie_id") REFERENCES movies ("movie_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_preferences" (
  "preference_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each preference */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user whose preferences are being stored */,
  "preference_key" TEXT /* Key of the preference (e.g., email_notifications, dark_mode) */,
  "preference_value" TEXT /* Value of the preference */,
  "preference_category" TEXT /* Category of the preference (e.g., account, playback) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("preference_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_preferences_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_history" (
  "history_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each viewing event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who watched the movie */,
  "movie_id" INTEGER /* ID of the movie being watched */,
  "view_date" TEXT /* Date the movie was watched */,
  "duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the viewing session in minutes */,
  "playback_position" INTEGER /* Playback position in seconds */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("history_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_history_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_history_movie_id FOREIGN KEY ("movie_id") REFERENCES movies ("movie_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "recommendations" (
  "recommendation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each recommendation */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who received the recommendation */,
  "movie_id" INTEGER /* ID of the recommended movie */,
  "score" REAL /* Score of the recommendation (e.g., 0.9 for high confidence) */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp when the recommendation was generated */,
  "algorithm" TEXT /* Algorithm used to generate the recommendation (e.g., collaborative filtering, content-based) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("recommendation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_recommendations_movie_id FOREIGN KEY ("movie_id") REFERENCES movies ("movie_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_recommendations_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "genres" (
  "genre_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each genre */,
  "genre_name" TEXT /* Name of the genre */,
  "genre_description" TEXT /* Description of the genre */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("genre_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "directors" (
  "director_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each director */,
  "director_name" TEXT /* Name of the director */,
  "director_biography" TEXT /* Biography of the director */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("director_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_sessions" (
  "session_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each session */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user whose session is being tracked */,
  "start_time" TEXT /* Start time of the session */,
  "end_time" TEXT /* End time of the session */,
  "session_duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the session in minutes */,
  "device_type" TEXT /* Type of device used for the session (e.g., desktop, mobile) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("session_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_sessions_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_feedback" (
  "feedback_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each feedback */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user providing feedback */,
  "feedback_text" TEXT /* Text of the feedback */,
  "feedback_date" TEXT /* Date the feedback was submitted */,
  "feedback_type" TEXT /* Type of feedback (e.g., suggestion, complaint) */,
  "rating" INTEGER /* Rating of the feedback (e.g., 1-5 stars) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("feedback_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_feedback_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "movie_genres" (
  "movie_genre_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each movie-genre relationship */,
  "movie_id" INTEGER /* ID of the movie */,
  "genre_id" INTEGER /* ID of the genre */,
  "is_primary" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating whether the genre is primary or not */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("movie_genre_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_movie_genres_movie_id FOREIGN KEY ("movie_id") REFERENCES movies ("movie_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_movie_genres_genre_id FOREIGN KEY ("genre_id") REFERENCES genres ("genre_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "movie_directors" (
  "movie_director_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each movie-director relationship */,
  "movie_id" INTEGER /* ID of the movie */,
  "director_id" INTEGER /* ID of the director */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the director in the movie (e.g., director, producer) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("movie_director_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_movie_directors_director_id FOREIGN KEY ("director_id") REFERENCES directors ("director_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_movie_directors_movie_id FOREIGN KEY ("movie_id") REFERENCES movies ("movie_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* Permissions associated with the role (e.g., read, write, admin) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_role_assignments" (
  "assignment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role assignment */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* ID of the role */,
  "assignment_date" TEXT /* Date the role was assigned to the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("assignment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_role_assignments_role_id FOREIGN KEY ("role_id") REFERENCES user_roles ("role_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_role_assignments_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "movie_stats" (
  "movie_stat_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each movie statistic */,
  "movie_id" INTEGER /* ID of the movie */,
  "view_count" INTEGER /* Number of times the movie has been viewed */,
  "like_count" INTEGER /* Number of likes the movie has received */,
  "dislike_count" INTEGER /* Number of dislikes the movie has received */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("movie_stat_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_movie_stats_movie_id FOREIGN KEY ("movie_id") REFERENCES movies ("movie_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_engagement" (
  "engagement_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user engagement metric */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "average_session_duration" REAL /* Average duration of the user's sessions in minutes */,
  "average_ratings_per_week" REAL /* Average number of ratings the user submits per week */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("engagement_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_engagement_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "system_performance" (
  "performance_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each system performance metric */,
  "response_time" REAL /* Average response time of the system in milliseconds */,
  "server_load" REAL /* Average server load */,
  "database_query_time" REAL /* Average database query time in milliseconds */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("performance_id")
)
